history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, head-and-shoulders portrait of a young Asian woman with long, dark brown hair styled in loose waves and two small braids near her temples. Her eyes are dark and alluring, framed by long, wispy eyelashes and subtle eye makeup. Her lips are full and painted with a soft, rosy-pink lipstick. She is wearing a white, ribbed, short-sleeved top with a low neckline and a small button closure. The lighting is soft and diffused, creating a gentle glow on her skin and highlighting her features. The background is dimly lit and appears to be an indoor setting with wooden elements, possibly a door or cabinet, and a darker wall. The overall mood is intimate and alluring, with a focus on her delicate features and soft beauty. The color palette is dominated by warm skin tones, dark hair, and the neutral white of her top, with subtle hints of pink on her lips. The style is realistic, with a touch of soft-focus or aesthetic filter applied.
